queries.query: SELECT i.INVOICE_ID, i.INVOICE_NUMBER, i.INVOICE_DATE, i.DUE_DATE, i.STATUS, i.NOTES, i.CREATED_DATE, c.CUSTOMER_ID, c.FIRST_NAME, c.LAST_NAME, c.EMAIL, ISNULL( (SELECT SUM(LINE_TOTAL) FROM HS_BILL_INVOICE_ITEMS WHERE INVOICE_ID = i.INVOICE_ID), 0 ) AS INVOICE_TOTAL FROM HS_BILL_INVOICES i INNER JOIN HS_BILL_CUSTOMERS c ON c.CUSTOMER_ID = i.CUSTOMER_ID ORDER BY i.CREATED_DATE DESC

SELECT i.INVOICE_ID, i.INVOICE_NUMBER, i.INVOICE_DATE, i.DUE_DATE, i.STATUS, i.NOTES, c.FIRST_NAME, c.LAST_NAME, ISNULL( (SELECT SUM(LINE_TOTAL) FROM HS_BILL_INVOICE_ITEMS WHERE INVOICE_ID = i.INVOICE_ID), 0 ) AS INVOICE_TOTAL FROM HS_BILL_INVOICES i INNER JOIN HS_BILL_CUSTOMERS c ON c.CUSTOMER_ID = i.CUSTOMER_ID WHERE i.STATUS = @Status ORDER BY i.CREATED_DATE DESC
SELECT i.*, c.FIRST_NAME, c.LAST_NAME, c.EMAIL, c.PHONE, c.ADDRESS FROM HS_BILL_INVOICES i INNER JOIN HS_BILL_CUSTOMERS c ON c.CUSTOMER_ID = i.CUSTOMER_ID WHERE i.INVOICE_ID = @InvoiceId
SELECT 'INV-' + RIGHT('0000' + CAST( ISNULL( (SELECT MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(INVOICE_NUMBER, 5, 10) AS INT)) FROM HS_BILL_INVOICES), 0 ) + 1 AS NVARCHAR), 4) AS NEXT_INVOICE_NUMBER
UPDATE HS_BILL_INVOICES SET CUSTOMER_ID = @CustomerId, INVOICE_DATE = @InvoiceDate, DUE_DATE = @DueDate, NOTES = @Notes WHERE INVOICE_ID = @InvoiceId AND STATUS = 'Pending'
UPDATE HS_BILL_INVOICES SET STATUS = 'Cancelled' WHERE INVOICE_ID = @InvoiceId
UPDATE HS_BILL_INVOICES SET STATUS = @Status WHERE INVOICE_ID = @InvoiceId
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM HS_BILL_PAYMENTS WHERE INVOICE_ID = @InvoiceId
SELECT STATUS, COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT, ISNULL( SUM( (SELECT SUM(LINE_TOTAL) FROM HS_BILL_INVOICE_ITEMS WHERE INVOICE_ID = i.INVOICE_ID) ), 0 ) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT FROM HS_BILL_INVOICES i GROUP BY STATUS

SELECT TOP 5 i.INVOICE_NUMBER, c.FIRST_NAME + ' ' + c.LAST_NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME, i.STATUS, ISNULL( (SELECT SUM(LINE_TOTAL) FROM HS_BILL_INVOICE_ITEMS WHERE INVOICE_ID = i.INVOICE_ID), 0 ) AS INVOICE_TOTAL FROM HS_BILL_INVOICES i INNER JOIN HS_BILL_CUSTOMERS c ON c.CUSTOMER_ID = i.CUSTOMER_ID ORDER BY i.CREATED_DATE DESC
